summary: Frontend-only testing for three bug fixes: (1) Audit Logs translation to English - VERIFIED WORKING, (2) Restaurant logo display after upload - VERIFIED WORKING, (3) Tenant/Restaurant name translation - VERIFIED WORKING in Dashboard, code review confirms SuperAdmin fixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three bug fixes verified working. Audit Logs translation, Restaurant logo display, and Tenant name translation all functioning correctly.

1_audit_logs_translation.description: Audit Logs tab and content translates correctly to English
verified: Tab shows 'Audit Logs' in English (not 'سجلات المراقبة')
Subtitle shows 'Record of all logins as another user'
translations_added: 'سجلات انتحال الهوية': { en: 'Impersonation Logs', ku: 'تۆماری چوونەناو کەسایەتی' }

2_restaurant_logo_display.description: Restaurant logo shows correctly after upload in Settings -> Restaurant

url_handling.fetchRestaurantSettings: Lines 618-626 - Handles logo URL with multiple fallbacks
url_handling.save_function: Lines 1918-1951 - Properly saves and updates logo URL
url_handling.display: Lines 1874-1881 - Handles different URL formats (http, /api, relative)

3_tenant_name_translation.description: Tenant/Restaurant names show in correct language based on app_language setting
